results.description:
Job Title:

3DEXPERIENCE PDM Technical Lead

Location:

Malaysia 

Salary Range:

RM 15,000 RM 19,000 per month

Start Date:

Mid-July 2025

Employment Type:

Full-time | Hands-on Technical Role

Job Overview:

We are looking for a skilled and motivated 3DEXPERIENCE PDM Technical Lead to join our clients IT team. The role is focused on supporting existing Product Data Management (PDM) processes using the Dassault 3DEXPERIENCE cloud platform, collaborating closely with business teams and factory stakeholders to manage product data and specifications (Levels 1 to 3).

Key Responsibilities:

  • Collaborate with business teams to gather and understand product specification requirements
  • Manage and model product data in the 3DEXPERIENCE platform
  • Support PDM-ERP integration (with SAP ECC)
  • Ensure accuracy, consistency, and security of product data
  • Implement collaborative environments for real-time teamwork
  • Apply analytics and data visualization to optimize performance
  • Maintain and administer user access, roles, and network reliability within the 3DEXPERIENCE environment
  • Provide technical support, documentation, and post-release training

Requirements:

Must-Have:

  • Strong hands-on experience with Dassault 3DEXPERIENCE (Cloud version)
  • Solid understanding of PDM data modeling and platform configuration
  • Excellent communication skills to engage with business and technical teams

Nice to Have:

  • Experience with SAP ECC integration
  • Knowledge in Quality Management within 3DEXPERIENCE
  • Familiarity with Agile methodologies
  • Exposure to manufacturing/factory environments

Interview Process:

  • 2 Rounds of Interviews
  • Local candidates welcome to apply

Were Hiring: Assistant Manager, Client Onboarding (KYC/CDD)
Location: Jalan Yap Kwan Seng, Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
Work Mode: Hybrid
Job Type: Permanent

Notice: Applicants must be Malaysian Citizens, PR, or RP holders with a valid work visa. Visa sponsorship is not available.

About the Company

Our client is a well-established financial services firm with a strong presence across Asia, delivering comprehensive securities brokerage and investment solutions to institutional and retail clients.

We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced professional to join our Client Onboarding team, with a key focus on performing KYC/CDD to ensure compliant onboarding and ongoing due diligence for both individual and corporate clients.

What You'll Do

  • Conduct and review Customer Due Diligence (CDD) and Know Your Customer (KYC) for individual and corporate clients, ensuring completeness and regulatory compliance
  • Perform risk assessment and Enhanced Due Diligence (EDD) where applicable
  • Implement and enhance controls and workflows related to client onboarding, processing, and maintenance to ensure regulatory compliance and improve turnaround times
  • Proactively address onboarding issues and implement risk mitigation measures
  • Serve as first-level escalation for complex or high-risk cases, providing clear guidance and advisory
  • Stay up to date on AML/CFT regulations, sanctions, and industry best practices; keep stakeholders informed and recommend updates to internal procedures

What You Bring

Must-have:

  • Minimum 5 years of relevant experience in KYC/CDD, preferably within financial services or related industries
  • Strong knowledge of MAS AML/CFT regulations and industry best practices
  • Strong hands-on experience in Source of Wealth (SOW) corroboration and documentation
  • Experience handling complex client profiles and performing SOW assessment
  • Excellent communication skills with ability to influence and collaborate with diverse stakeholders
  • Strong ownership mindset and confidence exercising judgement in a fast-changing environment
  • Applicants must be Malaysian Citizens, PR, or RP holders with a valid work visa. Visa sponsorship is not available.

Why Join Us

  • Opportunity to work in a high-impact compliance-facing onboarding function
  • Exposure to complex and high-risk client onboarding cases
  • Collaborative environment with strong stakeholder engagement
  • A role that values sound judgement, ownership, and process improvement

Apply Now: http://www.careers-page.com/oxy/job/W3377489
Reach out: soumini@oxydata.my | +601111406181
Explore more roles: https://oxydata.my/jobs/

#ClientOnboarding #KYC #CDD #AML #CFT #ComplianceJobs #RiskManagement #FinancialServices #KualaLumpurJobs #MalaysiaJobs

Backend Java Developer
Location: Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
Work Mode: Onsite
Job Type: Contract
Job ID: 933YXWXY

About Oxydata Software
Oxydata Software Sdn Bhd, a 100% Malaysian-owned IT company established in 2006, is a trusted technology partner specializing in Microsoft, Java, SAP, and Oracle platforms, delivering IT Managed Services, DevOps, Outsourcing, and Enterprise Application Development to drive digital transformation for global clients.

We are seeking an experienced Backend Java Developer to design, develop, and deploy robust backend systems—building scalable and secure services in a cloud-native environment.

What You'll Do

  • Develop and maintain backend services using Java and Spring Boot
  • Design and implement RESTful APIs and microservices architecture
  • Containerize applications using Docker and deploy on AWS ECS
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams in an Agile environment
  • Participate in code reviews, testing, and debugging
  • Use Jira for task tracking and Bitbucket for version control
  • Ensure backend systems meet scalability, performance, and security expectations

What You Bring
Must-have:

  • 5–7 years of professional experience in backend development
  • Proficiency in Java (8+)
  • Strong knowledge of Spring Boot
  • Hands-on experience with Docker or container technologies
  • Experience deploying and managing services on AWS ECS
  • Familiarity with Agile development practices
  • Working knowledge of Jira and Bitbucket
  • Excellent problem-solving and communication skills

Apply Now: http://www.careers-page.com/oxy/job/933YXWXY
Reach out: soumini@oxydata.my﻿| +601111406181
 Explore more roles: https://oxydata.my/jobs/

#BackendDeveloper #JavaDeveloper #SpringBoot #Microservices #AWS #ECS #Docker #Agile #KualaLumpurJobs #ContractJobs

Roles & Responsibilities

1. Target Business Opportunities:

  • Identify and pursue lucrative business opportunities within the property sector.
  • Introduce and promote our company's capabilities to potential clients.

2. Client Relationship Management:

  • Develop and nurture professional relationships with key personnel, from Cx-level executives to operational staff.
  • Proactively seek business opportunities through regular follow-ups and engagement.

3. Intelligence Gathering and Reporting:

  • Gather market intelligence and provide timely, quality inputs for weekly updates, monthly reports, project trackers, and other corporate reporting needs

4. Strategic Branding Activities:

  • Undertake extensive travel to meet customers and lead branding activities.
  • Conduct equipment demonstrations, participate in exhibitions, and coordinate with the Corporate Marketing Team.

5. Participation in Industry Events:

  • Actively engage in local and international programs, events, seminars, and exhibitions, particularly those related to the Semiconductor, Energy, and Renewables sectors.
  • Represent the company in industry association programs aligned with our business interests.

6. Market Analysis and Strategy Development:

  • Identify market potential and develop effective market strategies
  • Conduct market research utilizing SWOT analysis.
  • Estimate potential sales and work towards achieving set targets.

7. Marketing Material Alignment:

  • Ensure all marketing materials align with business requirements and objectives.


Requirements

  • Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Mass Communication or a related field.
  • At least 2 - 3 years of working experience in Property/ Construction field is required for this position
  • Proven experience in business development within the property industry.
  • Strong interpersonal and communication skills.
  • Ability to travel extensively as required.
  • Demonstrated success in developing and implementing effective market strategies.
  • Must be Malaysian nationality or Malaysian PR holder

Were Hiring: Business Development Manager – Cloud & Digital Transformation

Location: Petaling Jaya

Work Mode: Hybrid

Job Type: Permanent

﻿NOTICE: Applicants must be Malaysian Citizens, PR, or RP holders with a valid work visa. Visa sponsorship is not available.﻿

About the Company

Our client is a fast-growing cloud and digital transformation specialist with a strong presence across Asia and expanding global delivery capabilities. With a rapidly growing team of cloud, data, and AI experts, the organization partners with enterprises and mid-market clients to modernize legacy environments and accelerate innovation. Recognized for its deep hyperscaler partnerships and outcome-driven approach, it helps customers translate strategy into scalable, high-impact cloud solutions.

We are seeking an experienced Business Development Manager to drive new business acquisition and strategic account growth across Singapores enterprise and mid-market landscape, shaping multi-year cloud adoption and modernization journeys.

What You'll Do

  • ﻿Own the full end-to-end sales cycle for cloud-focused opportunities including prospecting, qualification, discovery, solution positioning, proposal development, negotiation, and closure
  • Develop and execute account and territory plans to drive new logo acquisition and expansion across cloud migration, modernization, data/AI, and managed cloud services
  • Build and deepen CXO and senior stakeholder relationships, positioning the organization as a strategic cloud transformation partner
  • Identify and drive upsell and cross-sell opportunities within existing cloud customers in collaboration with Technical Account Managers, solution architects, and delivery leaders
  • Partner with solution architects and delivery teams to design credible architectures, proposals, SoWs, and commercials aligned to customer outcomes and profitability
  • Conduct value-based discovery, quantify ROI using business metrics, and leverage assessment or pilot programs to qualify for full subscription deployment
  • Maintain a strong cloud-centric opportunity pipeline with rigorous qualification, disciplined forecasting, and high CRM hygiene
  • Provide regular deal reviews and forecasts, sharing insights on market trends, competition, and partner strategies
  • Represent the organization at cloud ecosystem events, hyperscaler forums, and customer workshops to build brand visibility and generate demand
  • Collaborate closely with AWS partner teams and the broader ecosystem to accelerate opportunities


What You Bring

Must-have:

  • 5+ years of B2B sales or business development experience within the cloud industry, with consistent overachievement of revenue targets
  • Strong enterprise sales exposure across cloud consulting, integration, managed services, hyperscalers, or SaaS environments
  • Deep understanding of AWS, Azure, or GCP including migration, modernization, containers, serverless, DevOps, data platforms, security, and FinOps concepts
  • Proven ability to close complex, multi-stakeholder cloud deals such as migration programs, managed services, and data or AI initiatives
  • Strong executive presence with the ability to engage C-level stakeholders and ecosystem partners
  • Commercial and financial acumen in structuring pricing models and profitable deals
  • Advanced consultative selling capabilities with strong discovery and value-based positioning skills
  • Experience orchestrating cross-functional teams to progress and close complex opportunities
  • Data-driven sales discipline with strong pipeline management and forecasting accuracy
  • Excellent communication, negotiation, and executive storytelling skills
  • Adaptability and ownership mindset suited to a high-growth environment

Nice-to-have:

  • AWS Certified Solutions Architect (Associate or Professional)
  • FinOps Certified Practitioner
  • AI/ML certifications or hands-on exposure to GenAI solutioning 


Why Join Us

  • Drive high-impact, multi-year cloud transformation programs across enterprise clients
  • Engage directly with CXOs and strategic decision-makers
  • Collaborate with hyperscalers and ecosystem partners on cutting-edge cloud and GenAI initiatives
  • Be part of a high-growth environment with strong ownership and performance culture
  • Opportunity to build recurring revenue streams and strategic accounts

Apply Now: http://www.careers-page.com/oxy/job/W3648WX6

Reach out: talent@oxydata.my

Explore more roles: https://oxydata.my/jobs/

Business Development Manager – Staffing

Location: Petaling Jaya, Malaysia
Work Mode: Onsite
Job Type: Permanent
Job ID: 4RXW4RRV

TechTalent is a Malaysia-based tech staffing solution provider connecting businesses with high-quality IT professionals across software development, data, cloud, cybersecurity, and emerging technologies.

We help companies scale faster by providing the right talent—whether for contract roles, project-based needs, or long-term hires—while supporting tech professionals with meaningful career opportunities.

Our focus is simple: quality talent, speed, and trusted partnerships.

What is your role:

  • Responsible for supporting the Company sales especially on Staff Augmentation and Resource placement
  • Achieve sales targets through excellent telephone sales and communication skills.
  • Creation of sales leads, initiation of prospect calls.
  • Establishment of ongoing rapport with existing and potential customers.
  • Identification of new business opportunities through cold calling prospects generated by internal or external sources.
  • Maintain and expand the companys database of prospects.
  • Make regular follow-up calls to existing customers and develop the business through up-selling and cross-selling.
  • Penetrate all targeted accounts and increase sales from within the existing client base.
  • To carry any duties that have been assigned by the company or management.

What you need to have:

  • Must have at least 2 year of working experience in Staff/Talent Augmentation services.
  • Must be self-motivated with strong interpersonal skills & able to operate effectively as a team player with excellent customer service and communication with all levels of people.
  • Possess hunter sales attributes to drive and close sales.
  • Possess good written and spoken in English

As part of the expansion plan, we invite talented and experienced professionals to be part of our dynamic team. If you got the fire, passion and a burning desire for success then write to us.

Apply Now: http://www.careers-page.com/oxy/job/4RXW4RRV
Reach out: swamy@oxydata.my | +60-1164111889
Explore more roles: https://oxydata.my/jobs/

#BusinessDevelopment #RecruitmentSales #TechRecruitment #StaffingSolutions #B2BSales #HRTech #GenAI #PetalingJayaJobs #MalaysiaJobs #SalesJobs

Role: Business ﻿Development Manager - AI Solutions

Location: Petaling Jaya, Malaysia

Job Ref: 3625757 | Job Id:﻿7X479495

Oxydata Software Sdn Bhd is a Malaysian technology company established in 2006, helping organizations accelerate digital transformation through Generative AI solutions, enterprise application development, and IT managed services.

We specialize in practical AI applications including AI automation, RAG-based knowledge assistants, and AI-powered recruitment solutions that help companies improve productivity and business efficiency.

We are looking for a Business Development Manager – AI Solutions to help organizations understand how Generative AI, automation, and AI-driven recruitment platforms can transform the way they hire, operate, and grow.

In this role, you will work with SMEs and growing enterprises to identify opportunities where AI can improve hiring, productivity, and operational efficiency through consultative solution selling.

What You'll Do

Must-have

  • ﻿Bachelors degree in Business, Marketing, HR, IT, or related field
  • 3–6 years of B2B sales experience in one or more of the following:
    • Recruitment services or staffing
    • HRTech platforms
    • SaaS or technology solutions
    • IT services or digital solutions
  • Proven track record of achieving or exceeding sales targets in B2B solution selling (technology, SaaS, IT services, or digital solutions)
  • Ability to generate leads and build a consistent sales pipeline through outreach, networking, partnerships, and industry engagement
  • Strong consultative selling skills, able to understand business challenges and translate them into practical technology or AI solutions
  • Experience managing a structured sales process from lead generation, discovery, proposal, negotiation, to deal closure
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills with the ability to engage senior business stakeholders
  • Applicants must be Malaysian Citizens, PR, or RP holders with a valid work visa. Visa sponsorship is not available﻿﻿

Nice-to-have

  • Experience selling HRTech, SaaS, or digital transformation solutions
  • Exposure to AI tools, automation platforms, or data-driven solutions
  • Experience selling corporate training or consulting services

Why Join Us

  • Attractive base salary with uncapped commission structure
  • Opportunity to work at the forefront of AI adoption and digital transformation
  • Exposure to cutting-edge Generative AI and automation technologies
  • Fast career growth in a rapidly expanding technology market
  • Collaborative, innovative, and high-energy team environment

Apply Now: http://www.careers-page.com/oxy/job/7X479495

Reach out: swamy@oxydata.my | +60-1164111889

Explore more roles: https://oxydata.my/jobs/

#BusinessDevelopment #RecruitmentSales #TechRecruitment #StaffingSolutions #B2BSales #HRTech #GenAI #PetalingJayaJobs #MalaysiaJobs #SalesJobs

Oxydata Software Sdn Bhd is a local 100% Malaysian-owned MSC status company established in 2006. Were Hiring: C#.NET Developer (Dynamics 365 Integration)
Location: Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
Work Mode: Hybrid
Job Type: Contract

About the Company
Oxydata Software Sdn Bhd is a 100% Malaysian-owned IT company established in 2006, serving as a trusted technology partner for global clients. We specialize in Microsoft, Java, SAP, and Oracle platforms, delivering IT Managed Services, DevOps, Outsourcing, and Enterprise Application Development. Our mission is to drive digital transformation through high-quality, scalable technology solutions.

We are seeking a skilled C#.NET Developer (Dynamics 365 Integration) with a strong focus on API development and system integration, contributing to robust, efficient, and scalable enterprise solutions.

What You'll Do

  • Design, build, and maintain efficient, reusable, and reliable C# code with a focus on RESTful and SOAP APIs
  • Analyze, design, and coordinate system interfaces integrating databases, backend services, and third-party platforms
  • Collaborate with business analysts, front-end developers, and architects to translate requirements into working solutions
  • Implement automated testing and unit tests, identify bottlenecks, and resolve defects
  • Ensure application performance, quality, and responsiveness through best practices and code reviews
  • Prepare and maintain technical documentation across the SDLC
  • Provide ongoing support and maintenance for existing applications

What You Bring

Must-have:

  • Proficiency in C# and the .NET framework (.NET Core or higher)
  • Strong experience designing and building RESTful APIs and web services (Web API, WCF)
  • Solid understanding of OOP principles and design/architectural patterns
  • Experience with Microsoft SQL Server, including complex queries, stored procedures, and functions
  • Proficiency with version control tools such as Git or SVN
  • 3–5 years of experience as a C#/.NET Developer with proven system integration experience
  • Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills

Nice-to-have:

  • ﻿Bachelors degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field
  • Experience with cloud platforms such as Azure or AWS (e.g., AWS Lambda, RDS, Power Automate)
  • Hands-on experience integrating with Microsoft Dynamics 365
  • Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps, Git)

Apply Now: http://www.careers-page.com/oxy/job/7X4XRVYX
Reach out: swamy@oxydata.my﻿ | +601164111889

Explore more roles: https://oxydata.my/jobs/﻿
